title: A Guide to Resolving Git Conflicts

questions.sentence: In teambased development multiple people often modify the same file at the same time
This can result in a Merge Conflict
A conflict occurs when Git cannot automatically determine which changes are correct
To resolve a conflict you must manually go through the file and decide which version to keep or merge both manually
Once resolved you must stage the file and commit the changes
While conflicts can be stressful they are a normal part of working together and an important skill to master
